headline: McDonald's and Burger King face whopper of a burger problem
summary: While both brands have invested heavily in their chicken offerings in recent years, McDonald's and Burger King still treat burgers, the Big Mac and the Whopper, respectively, as their signature product. Burger King has heavily invested in the Whopper, offering new limited-time-offer variations and ...

headline: McDonald's Stock Price Targets Are Higher - Shorting MCD Puts Works Here
summary: McDonald's stock has benefited from higher analysts' price targets since its Feb. 11 earnings release. But the stock has been relatively flat. That makes it ideal for short-sellers of out-of-the-money MCD puts.

headline: Is McDonald’s Corporation (MCD) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is MCD a good stock to buy now? We came across a bullish thesis on McDonald’s Corporation on Basement Capital’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on MCD. McDonald’s Corporation’s share was trading at $327.94 as of March 10th. MCD’s trailing and forward P/E were 27.68 and 24.94 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. McDonald’s […]
